Bash(python -c "
import socket
domains = [''lyra-assist.ai'', ''lyra-assistant.ai'', ''lyra-bot.ai'', ''imlyra.ai'']
for d in domains:
    try:
        s = socket.socket\(socket.AF_INET, socket.SOCK_STREAM\)
        s.settimeout\(10\)
        s.connect\(\(''whois.nic.ai'', 43\)\)
        s.send\(\(d + ''\\r\\n''\).encode\(\)\)
        response = b''''
        while True:
            data = s.recv\(1024\)
            if not data:
                break
            response += data
        s.close\(\)
        text = response.decode\(''utf-8'', errors=''replace''\)
        if ''NOT FOUND'' in text.upper\(\):
            status = ''AVAILABLE''
        elif ''Domain Name:'' in text or ''Registrant'' in text:
            status = ''TAKEN''
        else:
            status = ''UNKNOWN''
        print\(f''{d}: {status}''\)
    except Exception as e:
        print\(f''{d}: ERROR - {e}''\)
")

Bash(python -c "
import subprocess
import socket

names = [
    ''lyra-help'', ''lyra-guide'', ''lyra-support'', ''lyra-advice'', ''lyra-explain'',
    ''lyra-clarify'', ''lyra-solve'', ''lyra-plan'', ''lyra-work'',
    ''lyra-agent'', ''lyra-helper'', ''lyra-coach'', ''lyra-companion'', ''lyra-advisor'',
    ''lyra-operator'', ''lyra-analyst'', ''lyra-expert'', ''lyra-assistive'',
    ''lyra-core'', ''lyra-hub'', ''lyra-system'', ''lyra-engine'', ''lyra-platform'',
    ''lyra-stack'', ''lyra-service'', ''lyra-suite'', ''lyra-cloud'', ''lyra-studio'',
    ''lyra-talk'', ''lyra-dialog'', ''lyra-interface'', ''lyra-ui'',
    ''lyra-console'', ''lyra-shell'', ''lyra-panel'', ''lyra-portal''
]

import urllib.request

print\(''Checking GitHub...''\)
github_free = []
for name in names:
    try:
        url = f''https://github.com/{name}''
        req = urllib.request.Request\(url, method=''HEAD''\)
        req.add_header\(''User-Agent'', ''Mozilla/5.0''\)
        response = urllib.request.urlopen\(req, timeout=5\)
        # 200 = exists
    except urllib.error.HTTPError as e:
        if e.code == 404:
            github_free.append\(name\)
            print\(f''  {name}: FREE''\)
    except Exception as e:
        print\(f''  {name}: ERROR''\)

print\(f''\\nGitHub free: {len\(github_free\)}''\)
for n in github_free:
    print\(f''  {n}''\)
")
